description: The manufacturing team needs updated fabrication files for the high-power rocket. Starting with 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork' loaded in OpenRocket, upgrade the Trapezoidal fin set by changing the thickness to 6.35 mm and the cross-section to 'Airfoil'. Run a flight simulation to verify performance. Save the upgraded design to '~/Documents/rockets/upgraded_fins.ork'. Export the 3D geometry as a Wavefront OBJ to '~/Documents/exports/rocket_3d.obj'. Additionally, export the design report and the fin templates as PDFs to '~/Documents/exports/design_report.pdf' and '~/Documents/exports/fin_templates.pdf' respectively.
